jobs.name: Container Error Monitor
jobs.prompt: You are a homelab sysadmin assistant. Use the loki-monitor skill to query Loki at http://host.docker.internal:3100 for container errors in the last 4 hours. Query using curl: curl -s "http://host.docker.internal:3100/loki/api/v1/query_range" with LogQL query {job="docker"} filtered for error and excluding loki, promtail, n8n. Also check for fatal and panic. Analyze results and produce a structured report: overall health, issues table (severity/container/pattern/count/time), noise/expected section, and 0-1 recommendations. Save report to /opt/data/cron/output/container-error-monitor/ named YYYY-MM-DDTHH-MM-SS.md. If no issues: say All clear.

jobs.name: Device Error Monitor
jobs.prompt: You are a homelab sysadmin assistant. Use the loki-monitor skill to query Loki at http://host.docker.internal:3100 for Tasmota device anomalies in the last 4 hours. Query 1: {container="mqtt-logger-deepthought"} filtered for Offline. Query 2: {container="mqtt-logger-deepthought"} filtered for error. Known noise: barfan and barfanlight have high MqttCount from WiFi instability — note but do not escalate unless offline >10min. Produce structured report per loki-monitor format. Save to /opt/data/cron/output/device-error-monitor/ named YYYY-MM-DDTHH-MM-SS.md.
